title: eucalyptus obliqua var. pilula
intro: Eucalyptus obliqua var. pilula, also known as Lemon-scented Gum, is a variant of the Eucalyptus obliqua tree, native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic actions. The health benefits of Eucalyptus obliqua var. pilula include relief from respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, extracts, and infusions that can be used topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
